title: The Next Threat Emerges
description: On pages 15–18, this part follows Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the next threat emerges.
scene: The scene focuses on the next threat emerges, with Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Buffalo
dialogue.text: Where are baby-5 and Buffalo's bodies?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Come now... don't ask such superfluous questions.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's not a very understanding man....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: hurry up and tell me your demands!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You have until tomorrow's morning edition

summary: The Next Threat Emerges. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
